core_functions.text: Regulation of land-use including protection of public land from encroachment and construction of buildings
Planning for economic and social development
Roads including flyover, underpass, subway, traffic islands, footpath road crossing facility, skywalk and bridges
Water supply for domestic, industrial and commercial purposes
Public health, sanitation including storm water drains, conservancy and solid and liquid waste management
Urban forestry, protection of the environment, promotion of ecological aspects and maintenance of environmental hygiene
Safe guarding the interests of persons with physical and mental disabilities
Slum improvement and upgradation including providing basic facilities
Provision and maintenance of urban amenities and facilities such as parks, gardens, playgrounds, public markets, bathing and washing ghats, waiting sheds for travelers
Promotion of cultural, educational and aesthetic aspects
Establishment and maintenance of burial and burning grounds, cremations, cremation grounds and electric crematoriums
Cattle pounds, care and veterinary services including prevention of cruelty to animals
Collection and updating of vital statistics including registration of births, deaths and marriages
Provision and maintenance of public amenities including street lighting, parking spaces for vehicles, bus stops and public conveniences like toilet facilities at public places
Regulation of slaughter houses and tanneries and sale of meat, fish and other perishable food stuffs among others

general_functions.text: Organising voluntary workers and promote community participation in all development activities
Awareness building against social evils such as dowry, domestic violence, abuse of children, casteism, homophobia, and xenophobia
Organize legal awareness campaigns among weaker sections, campaign against economic offences, adherence to civic duties, and promoting communal harmony
Organise relief activities during natural calamities and maintain relief centres like hospitals, dispensaries, asylums, rescue homes, maternity houses and child welfare centres, etc.
Mobilising local resources in cash or in kind
Organise and promote resident welfare associations, neighbourhood groups and committees, and self-help groups with focus on the poor
Disclosure and dissemination of information of public interest
Issue of licence to dangerous and offensive trades and industries
Issue of licence to domestic pet animals
Conservation and preservation of water bodies, gardens and green spaces
Conservation and preservation of places and buildings of historical and cultural importance
Promoting energy efficiency and build awareness on climate change
Promote introduction of Information Technology and e-Governance in the working of the City Corporation

items.text: Planned development of new areas for human settlement, erection and maintenance of boundary marks defining the limits or any alteration in the limits
Measures for beautification of the City Corporation area by setting up fountains, providing recreational areas, improving river banks, and landscaping
Integration of the development plans and schemes of the municipal area with the district or regional development plan
Preparation and keeping up to date of appropriate maps, data and records of lands within City Corporation and utility to which such lands are from time to time put
Organise campaigns for environmental awareness
Motivating local action for its upgrading, planting of trees, etc.
Reclamation of waste lands, promotion of social forestry and maintenance of open spaces
Establishment and maintenance of nurseries, promotion of greenery
Promotion of handicrafts
Formulate and implement self-employment schemes in industrial sector
Implementation of the entrepreneur development programmes
Identify the homeless, provision of house sites and houses, implementation of shelter rejuvenation programmes
Mobilise fund necessary for housing
Run the pre-primary, primary, higher secondary and technical schools, vocational training centres, and implement literacy programmes
Promote civic education, adult education, social education including family planning, environmental education and non formal education
Promotion of cultural activities including music, physical education, sports and theatres and infrastructure therefor
Advancement of science and technology in urban life
Organization, establishment and maintenance of art galleries and botanical or zoological collections
Maintenance of City Corporation office, and of all public monuments and places of historical, artistic and other importance
Presentation of awards to persons of distinction, paying homage on death to persons of repute
Holding and regulation of fairs, festivals, industrial and health exhibitions

Construct and maintain the roads except National Highways, State Highways and major District roads within the City Corporation, and buildings for institutions including those transferred from Government
Run dispensaries, primary and public health centers and hospitals under all systems of medicines, child welfare centers and mother care homes
Organise remedial and other preventive measures against disease
Implement family welfare programmes
Organise mass inoculation campaigns for eradication of infectious diseases
Reclamation of unhealthy localities, removal of noxious vegetation and abatement of all nuisances

Maintenance of all public tanks and regulating the re-excavation, repair and up-keep of all tanks, wells and other sources of water-supply and provision for unfiltered water supply for non-domestic uses
Public vaccination, prophylactic inoculations, vector control
Maintenance of ambulance service
Advancement of civic consciousness of public health and general welfare by organizing discourses, seminars and conferences
Prevention of food adulteration and control of eating-houses
Effective implementation of national and state strategies and programmes for prevention and control of diseases
Run Anganwadis, and institutions for the welfare of persons with disability, urban poor among others
Sanction and distribute pension to persons with disability, widows, urban poor, distribute unemployment wages, and implement Group Insurance Scheme to the poor
Implementation of programmes for liberation and rehabilitation of scavengers and their families
Campaigns for dissemination of information, vital for public welfare
Securing or removal of dangerous buildings and places, obstructions and projections in or upon streets, bridges and other public places
Develop skills and implement self-employment and group employment schemes for the poor, especially for women
Create community assets to get continuing benefit to the poor

sector_functions.title: Development of Persons belonging to Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe

items.text: Implementation of beneficiary-oriented schemes under Special Component Plan (SCP) and Tribal Sub Plan (TSP) and provide basic facilities in the residential centres and financial assistance for the Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe
Run nursery schools, vocational training centres for the Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe
Examine complaints against public distribution system and find out and implement remedial measures
Organise campaigns against offences relating to weights and measures
General supervision of shops and other public distribution system and to provide guidance

Maintain relief centres and organise relief activities like provision to hospitals, dispensaries, asylums, rescue homes, maternity houses, and child welfare centres, crematorium, burial ground among other
